prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-DCHDBS332-10PC-332-2 Product Type: DRILL_BITS Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: Precision 10pc Diamond Coated H.S.S. Drill Bit Set 3/32" Description: This Universal Tool 10 pc. Drill Bit Set is ideal for tough jobs and hard surfaces. The diamond coating gives the bits extreme strength, allowing you to drill through glass, marble, tile, stone and much more.

This set is a handy addition to any tool box or workshop. Search Terms: drill bit set hobby tools precision Features: - Size: 3/32" Shank - Overall Length: 2" - Diamond Coated Length: 15-20mm - Grit 120 === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool 10-pc 3/32" Diamond Coated H.S.S. Drill Bits

anthropic.title_differentiation: Diamond Coated, Precision Drilling, Glass And Tile, Hard Surfaces, 2 Inch Length, 120 Grit

openai.title_differentiation: Diamond Coated HSS, 120 Grit, For Glass Marble Tile Stone, 2" Length, 15-20Mm Cutting Edge, Precision Hobby Use
